messages: استاذ كيف الحال كرما احتاج السعر ينزل شوي حاب اجرب معاكم
محتاج ردك استاذ عمر عشان اقرر
صعب يعني
صديق 😂
نعم كنت في البزنس باي
وادرس بمكتبة سنقلتون
متخرج Human Resources Management Master Degree
ماشاءالله
انا 2019
دام كذا بينا جامعة وسوانزي رتب لي شي وضروري اشوفك
اتشرف والله 😂

Hello there. I’m traveling to Cairo for my birthday and I loved the reviews of your property. Very modern, clean and safe. It appears that there is quite a bit to do in the area and not too far from the airport and attractions.
Good Morning Omar!!! Here are copies of our passports
Also, is it possible to get an early check in?
Ohhh ok. Thank you
Is it possible to do a late check out for 1:00 pm?
Hello, I am on a business trip. Will drive to Cairo from Alexandria tomorrow. I used Airbnb in my trips to Europe, but always stayed in hotels in Egypt. I would like to experience Airbnb in Egypt.

Thank you very much, so far all is fine and comfortable. I may only need and request late check out on Feb 12th. My flight is after midnigth and if possible I may request to leave flat around 10:00-11:00 PM instead of 11:00 AM.
What is the latest time for free late check out time?
How can I pay half night price (as your proposal) for checkout around 10:00 PM? As per my calculation half night price is 48 USD, kindly confirm.
Dear Omar, I will check out at 11:30, FYI.
I already checked out at normal time
No need for late check out

Hello Omar, overall it was nice staying for me and 4 star out of 5 is quite high ranking at my end. I would prefer to watch tv by laying down on sofa but your design was not so comfortable for that. I wish to have dish washer and if Washing machine would have drying cabability my ranking would be 5 star. 
These are small details that will ensure perfection, but as I said, overall I'm satisfied.
مرحبا عمر ، هل العقار في السيلفر بلم ؟
خلاص حجزت عندك بمشيئة الله 🌹
اي والله واتشرف بس بشوف كذا خيار عزيزي عمر وبرجع اتواصل معك بمشيئة الله
يا مرحبا ، الوصول للقاهرة بيكون تقريباً الساعه ١ والنصف ظهراً تعرف على بال ما نخلص اجراءات المطار فممكن من 2-3 مساءً بمشيئة الله
التقيك يوم السبت
